parameters.jsonBody:
{"model": "gpt-4o-mini", "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are analyzing a call transcript for an HVAC Premium AI Receptionist. The premium agent has booking capability.

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "lead_score": <1-10>,
  "is_hot_lead": <true/false>,
  "caller_name": "<string or null>",
  "caller_phone": "<string or null>",
  "caller_address": "<string or null>",
  "service_requested": "<string>",
  "job_type": "<short label>",
  "summary": "<2-3 sentences>",
  "urgency": "<low/medium/high>",
  "vulnerable_occupant": <true/false>,
  "notes": "<any important details>",
  "booking_attempted": <true/false>,
  "booking_success": <true/false>,
  "appointment_date": "<YYYY-MM-DD or null>",
  "appointment_time_window": "<morning/afternoon/null>",
  "job_type_booked": "<string or null>",
  "reschedule_or_cancel": "<reschedule/cancel/neither>"
}"}, {"role": "user", "content": "=Transcript:
---
{{ $json.transcript }}
---"}]}

parameters.jsCode:
// Build booking confirmation notification const d = $('Parse Call Data').first().json; const emailHtml = `

📅 New Booking — ${d.company_name}

Caller${d.caller_name || 'Unknown'}
Phone${d.caller_phone || 'Not captured'}
Address${d.caller_address || 'Not captured'}
Service${d.job_type_booked || d.service_requested || 'Not specified'}
Date${d.appointment_date || 'TBC'}
Time${d.appointment_time_window || 'TBC'}
Summary${d.call_summary || ''}
`; return { ...d, emailHtml, notificationType: 'booking' };

// Build lead notification (fallback — booking not made) const d = $('Parse Call Data').first().json; const emailHtml = `

🔥 New Lead — ${d.company_name}

Caller${d.caller_name || 'Unknown'}
Phone${d.caller_phone || 'Not captured'}
Address${d.caller_address || 'Not captured'}
Service${d.service_requested || 'Not specified'}
Lead Score${d.lead_score}/10
Urgency${d.urgency || 'Unknown'}
Booking Attempted${d.booking_attempted ? 'Yes — calendar unavailable' : 'No'}
Summary${d.call_summary || ''}
`; return { ...d, emailHtml, notificationType: 'lead' };
